use_cases: Displaying animated statistics and metrics with smooth number transitions
Creating price displays with sliding digit animations in e-commerce
Building dashboard counters with spring-physics-based number animations
Implementing rating or score displays with fluid digit morphing
Creating timer or countdown components with seamless sliding digit changes
ai_summary: A sliding number component that animates individual digits vertically with spring physics for smooth transitions. Uses motion/react with physics-based easing and layoutId for seamless morphing between digit states. Ideal for displaying counters, prices, and statistics in dashboards, e-commerce, and analytics interfaces with elegant animated number displays.
